compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based auto speed control, negative pressure regulation, separate day/night speed profiles
compatible_devices.notes: Prima Klima ECblue fans sold directly in GrowControl shop; standard RJ45 cable (RJEC pin layout); 2 dedicated EC fan ports (1 intake, 1 exhaust); full 0-10V speed control with RPM feedback; up to 10 RJ45 ports supports multi-sensor alongside EC fan control

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: GrowControl Cable RJ45-open ends EC or GrowControl Cable RJ45-jack plug
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based auto speed control, negative pressure regulation, separate day/night speed profiles
compatible_devices.notes: GrowControl offers open-end cable (color-coded per RJEC standard) for fans with screw terminals, and jack-to-RJ45 cable for fans with 3.5mm jack; fan must be voltage-controlled (0-10V); temperature-controlled EC fans not supported; S&P TD-Silent series may have issues

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: SANlight EVO 4-100, SANlight Q6W Gen2, SANlight STIXX driver
compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: SANlight GrowControl Adapter (EVO) or SANlight GrowControl Adapter (Q-Series Gen2)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: EVO series uses 0-10V (turns off completely at 0V, no Schuko socket needed for off); socket 4 at 2300W with 2-pole disconnect handles large arrays; Y-splitters available for daisy-chaining multiple lamps; EVO adapter uses Wieland RST20i3 connector

compatible_devices.connector_or_protocol: RJ45 0-10V via LLT M12 push-lock adapter
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Cable uses LLT M12 push-lock connector on Lumatek side; compatible with newer Lumatek Zeus models; 0-10V dimming with sunrise/sunset; complete off via 0-10V signal; daisy-chain multiple units via RJ45 adapters; socket 4 at 2300W for Schuko switching of large arrays

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V/1-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Adapter cable listed by retailer; socket 4 at 2300W with 2-pole disconnect for complete off if 1-10V variant

compatible_devices.required_adapter_or_module: GrowControl Cable RJ45-0-10V or custom wiring (pin assignment of luminaire must be known)
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Sunrise/sunset gradual dimming, 0-10V/1-10V precise dimming, day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: All LEDs with 0-10V input can turn off completely at 0V; 1-10V LEDs stay at min ~10% brightness and require Schuko socket 4 (2300W, 2-pole) for complete shutoff; GrowControl offers generic 5m RJ45-0-10V cable

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Day/night timer switching, event timer scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: On/off switching only, no dimming; socket 4 rated 2300W with 2-pole disconnect and inrush current limiter handles up to 1000W HPS/CMH ballasts; socket 4 recommended for HID

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: On/off based on temp/humidity/CO2 setpoints, separate day/night settings
compatible_devices.notes: Standard AC duct fans with running capacitor; on/off only (no speed control); max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3), 2300W socket 4; S&P TD-Silent series may have compatibility issues; intake/exhaust modes supported

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based humidity auto-regulation, separate day/night RH setpoints
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V humidifier; automatic on/off based on humidity sensor reading and VPD setpoint; max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: VPD-based humidity auto-regulation; dehumidification also achievable via EC exhaust fan speed increase without dedicated unit
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V dehumidifier via Schuko; also supports dehumidification via exhaust fan speed modulation (no separate unit needed); max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: CO2 setpoint auto-regulation (daytime only, requires CarbSense sensor); sensor-less CO2 timer mode also available
compatible_devices.notes: CO2 generators and solenoid valves (230V) via Schuko socket; CarbSense CO2 sensor (sold separately) connects via RJ45 for closed-loop control; CO2 control operates in daytime only; max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Temperature setpoint auto-regulation, separate day/night temp setpoints, predictive temperature control
compatible_devices.notes: Electric heaters via Schuko; socket 4 (2300W) recommended for high-wattage heaters; sockets 1-3 each rated 1200W; automatic on/off based on temperature sensor; heating mat also supported with dedicated temperature sensor via RJ45

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Interval timer and event timer-based irrigation scheduling; day/night scheduling
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V water/irrigation pump via Schuko; timer-based scheduling (daily, interval, event); max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3)

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Timer-based scheduling (daily, interval, event timers); day/night mode
compatible_devices.notes: Any 230V circulation/oscillating fan via Schuko; on/off only (no speed control); max 1200W per socket (sockets 1-3)

compatible_devices.compatible_model_examples: CarbSense CO2 sensor, PresSense negative pressure sensor, IRCube leaf temperature sensor
compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Multi-sensor averaging for redundancy; VPD calculation from temp+humidity; predictive climate control using sensor history; CO2 setpoint feedback loop
compatible_devices.notes: 8 RJ45 ports including MOSFET DC output; multi-sensor support (multiple sensors of same type for redundancy); humidity+temperature sensor included; CarbSense (CO2), PresSense (negative pressure), IRCube (leaf temp) sold separately; heating mat temp sensor available

compatible_devices.ai_feature_scope: Individually programmable socket functions; up to 25 total sockets via 4x daisy-chained PowerExtender units
compatible_devices.notes: PowerExtender 4+ adds 4 Schuko sockets (2x 2300W with 2-pole + inrush limiter, 2x 600W) plus 0-10V dimming output and DC output; up to 4 units daisy-chained for 25 total sockets; connected via RJ45 to GrowBase Pro's In/Out port
